overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a warrior character traversing a desolate, misty mountain landscape. The character walks across rocky plateaus, along dangerous cliff edges, and through ancient ruins with wooden posts and tattered banners in a dark, atmospheric game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky plateau with distant mountain peaks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the rocky terrain toward the misty horizon

entered.detail: dark volcanic rock ground with scattered stones and patches of snow
misty mountain peaks visible on the horizon under gray skies
low-lying fog and mist covering the distant landscape

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide, desolate rocky plateau under an overcast sky. The terrain is barren with dark volcanic rocks, and misty mountains are visible in the far distance. The atmosphere is quiet and foreboding as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside path with steep drop to abyss

events.description: character reaches the cliff edge and begins walking along the narrow precipice path
character slows and hugs the left cliff wall while navigating the treacherous narrow section

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the narrow cliff edge with a steep misty abyss on the right side

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall rising immediately to the left of the path
steep drop-off into mist-filled chasm with swirling clouds below

segments.scene_description: The path narrows to a dangerous cliffside trail with a sheer rock face on the left and a terrifying drop into a misty abyss on the right. The character proceeds cautiously along the precipice, with swirling fog obscuring the depths below. The lighting grows dimmer as the path becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined settlement with wooden posts and tattered banners

events.description: character climbs up from the cliff path into an area with ancient stone ruins
character approaches and walks past wooden posts with tattered white banners fluttering in the wind

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky slope and walking through the ancient ruins, passing wooden posts with tattered fabric banners

entered.detail: tall wooden pillars with tattered white fabric banners attached, marking the ruin entrance
weathered white cloth banners hanging from posts, fluttering in the wind
ancient stone wall remains and broken structures scattered across the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character climbs up from the cliff path into a ruined settlement marked by ancient stone walls and tall wooden posts bearing tattered white banners. The wind picks up, causing the fabric to flutter as the character walks through the desolate ruins. The path winds between broken timbers and stone structures under the persistent gray mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate mountain landscape that shifts from an open volcanic plateau to a claustrophobic cliffside and finally into a ruined settlement. It begins with the character traversing a wide, barren expanse of dark volcanic rock under an overcast sky with distant misty peaks. As the terrain narrows, the camera follows the character onto a precarious cliffside trail, where the open horizon is replaced by a sheer rock face and a swirling, foggy abyss. The scene then ascends from the precipice into a desolate ruin, where the environment transforms into a maze of ancient stone walls and tall wooden posts. Finally, the path winds through broken timbers and tattered white banners that flutter in the rising wind under a persistent gray mist.
